entry.title: XPeng L03 DRIVEN: Has China SOLVED The Model Y?!
entry.summary:
The XPeng L03 is a $21,000 electric crossover with Model Y-rivalling space, advanced technology, and XPeng’s VLA 2.0 driving system. It costs around $18,000 less than the cheapest Tesla Model Y in China, and it is coming to Europe and other global markets.
XPeng L03 First Look: https://youtu.be/t9Oj4YOhW8A
In this video, I test the XPeng L03 on the road and examine its price, range, charging, interior, practicality, suspension, export specifications, and VLA 2.0 technology. With European pricing yet to be announced, could this half-price Model Y rival expose just how expensive mainstream EVs have become?
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇
____________________________________________________________
✅ Highlights:
- XPeng L03 starts from $18,000 less than Tesla Model Y in China - Uses 2 XPeng Turing AI Chips 1500 TOPs - XPeng VLA 2.0 ADAS (FSD Beta Rival) - Coming to Australia, Europe and 63 countries - XPeng VLA 2.0 coming to Europe in 2027 ____________________________________________________________
⏱️ Video Chapters:
0:00 - Intro 0:17 - Check Out the First Look?
0:39 - XPeng L03 Price
1:05 - Exterior 1:20 - Frunk and Trunk Space
1:56 - Interior (Rear) 2:37 - Interior (Front)
4:18 - Charging Speed 4:44 - Battery and Range
5:14 - Driving Impressions 7:03 - XPeng VLA 2.0 8:56 - VLA 2.0 Coming to Europe
10:01 - Conclusion ____________________________________________________________
📍 Shot in Beijing, China 🎥 Subscribe for more in-depth reviews of the latest Chinese EVs
𝕏 https://x.com/chinadriven 📸 https://instagram.com/chinadriven ▶️ https://youtube.com/chinadriven
#XPeng #XPengL03 #TeslaModelY #ChineseEV #ChinaEV #ElectricSUV #EVReview #AffordableEV #ElectricVehicle #AutonomousDriving #VLA2 #ADAS #ChinaDriven
entry.content:
The XPeng L03 is a $21,000 electric crossover with Model Y-rivalling space, advanced technology, and XPeng’s VLA 2.0 driving system. It costs around $18,000 less than the cheapest Tesla Model Y in China, and it is coming to Europe and other global markets.

XPeng L03 First Look: https://youtu.be/t9Oj4YOhW8A

In this video, I test the XPeng L03 on the road and examine its price, range, charging, interior, practicality, suspension, export specifications, and VLA 2.0 technology. With European pricing yet to be announced, could this half-price Model Y rival expose just how expensive mainstream EVs have become?

Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇

____________________________________________________________

✅ Highlights:

- XPeng L03 starts from $18,000 less than Tesla Model Y in China
- Uses 2 XPeng Turing AI Chips 1500 TOPs
- XPeng VLA 2.0 ADAS (FSD Beta Rival)
- Coming to Australia, Europe and 63 countries
- XPeng VLA 2.0 coming to Europe in 2027
____________________________________________________________

entry.title: This NIO ES8 Has Fewer Seats And More EVERYTHING!
entry.summary:
The NIO ES8 5-seater takes NIO’s luxury electric SUV and makes it more spacious, more practical, and arguably more interesting. By removing the third row, NIO has created huge rear-seat space, a massive boot, and a five-seat version that feels like more than just a seat option.
NIO ES8 full Review: https://youtu.be/RNIcmEhxSgY
In this video, I look at what makes the NIO ES8 five-seat version different from the six-seat and seven-seat models, including the rear-seat layout, luxury features, cargo space, fridge, massage seats, and the latest NIO World Model ADAS update.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇
____________________________________________________________
✅ Highlights:
* NIO ES8 five-seat luxury electric SUV * Same 5.28m body as the six-seat and seven-seat ES8 * Huge second-row legroom with reclining rear bench * HUGE Trunk space * Latest NIO World Model ADAS update
____________________________________________________________
⏱️ Video Chapters:
0:00 - Intro 0:22 - What's New?
01:02 - NIO ES8 Exterior Changes
01:41 - NIO ES8 (Front Interior) 02:21 - NIO ES8 (Rear Interior)
04:23 - Support the Channel
04:39 - NIO ES8 Trunk 06:01 - NIO ES8 Frunk
06:30 - NIO ES8 Driving
06:48 - NIO ES8 ADAS
10:33 - Outro
____________________________________________________________
📍 Shot in Inner Mongolia, China 🎥 Subscribe for more in-depth reviews of the latest Chinese EVs
𝕏 https://x.com/chinadriven 📸 https://instagram.com/chinadriven ▶️ https://youtube.com/chinadriven
#NIO #NIOES8 #ChinaEV #ElectricSUV #EVReview #LuxurySUV #ChineseEV #ADAS #AutonomousDriving #ElectricVehicle #NIOWorldModel #ChinaDriven

The NIO ES8 5-seater takes NIO’s luxury electric SUV and makes it more spacious, more practical, and arguably more interesting. By removing the third row, NIO has created huge rear-seat space, a massive boot, and a five-seat version that feels like more than just a seat option.

NIO ES8 full Review: https://youtu.be/RNIcmEhxSgY

In this video, I look at what makes the NIO ES8 five-seat version different from the six-seat and seven-seat models, including the rear-seat layout, luxury features, cargo space, fridge, massage seats, and the latest NIO World Model ADAS update.


Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇

____________________________________________________________

* NIO ES8 five-seat luxury electric SUV
* Same 5.28m body as the six-seat and seven-seat ES8

* HUGE Trunk space

entry.title: Xpeng L03: European Carmakers Will Panic Over This Chinese EV
entry.summary:
The Xpeng Mona L3 is coming for the European EV market. See why mainstream manufacturers are worried about this new competitor.
European car brands like VW and Audi are facing serious competition as premium Chinese EVs enter their home territory. The Xpeng Mona L3 represents a new strategy, bringing advanced, premium tech into the entry-level EV segment. This shift creates a direct challenge for established mainstream OEMs that have previously dominated the region.
In this video, we take a quick first look at the XPeng L03 entry-level EV and break down how XPeng is trying to bring premium-level tech into the mainstream EV segment. This car is clearly aimed at both China and global markets, including Europe.
The bigger picture here is what this car represents. Chinese EV brands are no longer just challenging European luxury cars, they are now targeting the mainstream market where brands like Ford, Nissan, and Renault operate.
Disclaimer: The vehicle shown in the video is the Chinese-spec model filmed in China. Models and configurations for other markets shall be subject to actual vehicles available locally.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 ____________________________________________________________ ✅ Highlights:
- Entry-level EV with premium-level technology stack - 3 in-house developed self-driving chips (~2250 TOPS compute) - 800V architecture with fast charging capability - EV and EREV variants with up to 1000km+ combined range
____________________________________________________________ ⏱️ Video Chapters:
0:00 - Intro 0:37 - A bit of Xpeng L03 context? 1:14 - Xpeng L03 Styling 1:39 - Xpeng L03 Tech 2:39 - AI Chassis
3:41 - Xpeng L03 Interior (Front) 5:16 - Xpeng L03 Interior (Rear)
6:07 - Charging, Range, Powertrain
7:13 - Outro
____________________________________________________________ 📍 Shot in Beijing, China 🎥 Subscribe for more in-depth reviews of the latest Chinese EVs
𝕏 https://x.com/chinadriven 📸 https://instagram.com/chinadriven ▶️ https://youtube.com/chinadriven
#XPeng #ElectricSUV #ChinaEV #EVReview #ElectricVehicle #ADAS #AutonomousDriving #TechReview #ChinaDriven
entry.content:
The Xpeng Mona L3 is coming for the European EV market. See why mainstream manufacturers are worried about this new competitor.

European car brands like VW and Audi are facing serious competition as premium Chinese EVs enter their home territory. The Xpeng Mona L3 represents a new strategy, bringing advanced, premium tech into the entry-level EV segment. This shift creates a direct challenge for established mainstream OEMs that have previously dominated the region.

In this video, we take a quick first look at the XPeng L03 entry-level EV and break down how XPeng is trying to bring premium-level tech into the mainstream EV segment. This car is clearly aimed at both China and global markets, including Europe.

The bigger picture here is what this car represents. Chinese EV brands are no longer just challenging European luxury cars, they are now targeting the mainstream market where brands like Ford, Nissan, and Renault operate.

Disclaimer: The vehicle shown in the video is the Chinese-spec model filmed in China. Models and configurations for other markets shall be subject to actual vehicles available locally.

Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇
____________________________________________________________
✅ Highlights:

- Entry-level EV with premium-level technology stack
- 3 in-house developed self-driving chips (~2250 TOPS compute)
- 800V architecture with fast charging capability
- EV and EREV variants with up to 1000km+ combined range

____________________________________________________________

entry.title: NIO ES9: China's BEST EV Left Hammond...BLOWN AWAY!
entry.summary:
I got a chance to drive the NIO's new flagship SUV the NIO ES9, I wasn't the only one either. Richard Hammond (Top Gear, The Grand Tour) was also there filming the NIO ES9 and I got a chance to ask him some questions

entry.title: Beijing Auto Show 2026: 8 GIANT SUVs. INSANE!
entry.summary:
At Beijing Auto Show 2026, over 1,400 cars were unveiled — but we're focusing on the 8 BIGGEST Chinese SUVs that are rewriting the rulebook. From a $22,000 budget giant to a $77,000 luxury flagship that makes Range Rover look like poverty spec, China is building some of the most impressive large SUVs on the planet.In this video, we walk you through the best massive SUVs from the Beijing Auto Show 2026 — covering design, tech, range, and price. Whether you're into off-road monsters, tech-loaded flagships, or incredible value, there's something here that will blow your mind.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 ____________________________________________________________ ✅ Highlights:
Wuling Xingguang L — 6-seater under $22,000 with 260km EV range Nio ES9 — $77,000 flagship with 42-point massage & battery swap in 3 minutes Freelander — British name, Chinese tech, 5.1 meters of modern muscle Hongqi 1927 — 4 motors, 1,850 Nm, three locking diffs & 0-100 in under 4 seconds VW Unix 08 — Built on XPENG's G9 platform with VLA 2.0 ADAS & 700km range XPENG GX — 5.3 meters, 3000 TOPS compute, 750km range — the tech king Leapmotor D19 — Longer than BMW X7, starts at $32,000 — the value king BYD Grand Tang — 780hp, megawatt flash charging, 0-97% in 8 minutes
____________________________________________________________ ⏱️ Video Chapters:
00:00 - Intro: Beijing Auto Show 2026
Top 8 BIG SUVs 00:32 - Wuling Xingguan L 02:14 - NIO ES9 03:18 - FREELANDER 97 Concept 05:11 - Hongqi 1927 07:09 - VW UNYX 08 08:45 - Xpeng GX 10:39 - Leapmotor D19 12:25 - BYD Da Tang
Honourable Mentions 13:49 - Beijing CITY HUNTER 14:08 - VW ID. ERA 9X 14:38 - Li Auto L9 Livis
15:13 - OUTRO
____________________________________________________________ 📍 Shot in Beijing 🎥 Subscribe for more in-depth reviews of the latest Chinese EVs
𝕏 https://x.com/chinadriven 📸 https://instagram.com/chinadriven ▶️ https://youtube.com/chinadriven
#BeijingAutoShow2026 #ChineseSUV #ElectricSUV #NioES9 #XPENGgx #LeapMotor #Hongqi #BYD #Freelander #ChineseEV #ChinaEV #LuxurySUV #EVReview #ChinaDriven
entry.content:
At Beijing Auto Show 2026, over 1,400 cars were unveiled — but we're focusing on the 8 BIGGEST Chinese SUVs that are rewriting the rulebook. From a $22,000 budget giant to a $77,000 luxury flagship that makes Range Rover look like poverty spec, China is building some of the most impressive large SUVs on the planet.In this video, we walk you through the best massive SUVs from the Beijing Auto Show 2026 — covering design, tech, range, and price. Whether you're into off-road monsters, tech-loaded flagships, or incredible value, there's something here that will blow your mind.

Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇
____________________________________________________________
✅ Highlights:

Wuling Xingguang L — 6-seater under $22,000 with 260km EV range
Nio ES9 — $77,000 flagship with 42-point massage & battery swap in 3 minutes
Freelander — British name, Chinese tech, 5.1 meters of modern muscle
Hongqi 1927 — 4 motors, 1,850 Nm, three locking diffs & 0-100 in under 4 seconds
VW Unix 08 — Built on XPENG's G9 platform with VLA 2.0 ADAS & 700km range
XPENG GX — 5.3 meters, 3000 TOPS compute, 750km range — the tech king
Leapmotor D19 — Longer than BMW X7, starts at $32,000 — the value king
BYD Grand Tang — 780hp, megawatt flash charging, 0-97% in 8 minutes

____________________________________________________________
⏱️ Video Chapters:

00:00 - Intro: Beijing Auto Show 2026

Top 8 BIG SUVs
00:32 - Wuling Xingguan L
02:14 - NIO ES9
03:18 - FREELANDER 97 Concept
05:11 - Hongqi 1927

entry.title: NIO ONVO L80 is Perfectly BORING with MASSIVE storage!
entry.summary:
The ONVO L80 is the latest EV from NIO's sub brand. The ONVO L80 is a 5-seat variant of the previously popular ONVO L90. In this video, we take a quick yet thorough look at the L80 and explore how ONVO has reworked the L90 into a large 5 seat version.
This video covers all the major details of the ONVO L80, from its stylish green colour and frunk features to the massive trunk space that easily rivals the NIO ET5 Touring. We also take a look at the upgraded ADAS system, now with roof-mounted LIDAR, making the ONVO L80 an even smarter vehicle than the first ONVO L90.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 ____________________________________________________________ ✅ Highlights:
Same dimensions as the L90 with a new green color Spacious 240-liter frunk & innovative camp kitchen Upgraded ADAS hardware, including roof-mounted LIDAR Impressive 17.3-inch rear entertainment screen 23-speaker sound system with 7.1.4 Dolby Atmos Efficient with 14.3kWh/100km for rear-wheel drive
____________________________________________________________ ⏱️ Video Chapters:
00:00 - ONVO L80 Intro
0:41 - What is the ONVO L80?
00:59 - ONVO L80 Exterior 2:02 - ONVO L80 Frunk Accessories 02:28 - ONVO L80 Power & Suspension 02:41 - Trunk Space 03:37 - ONVO L80 Interior (Front) 05:24 - ONVO L80 Interior (Rear)
07:45 - ONVO L80 ADAS 08:08 - ONVO L80 Battery & Efficiency
09:07 - Outro
____________________________________________________________ 📍 Shot in China 🎥 Subscribe for more in-depth reviews of the latest Chinese EVs
𝕏 https://x.com/chinadriven 📸 https://instagram.com/chinadriven ▶️ https://youtube.com/chinadriven
#ONVOL80 #ElectricSUV #ONVOReview #ChinaEV #EVReview #ElectricVehicle #AffordableEV #LuxuryEV #ADAS #TechDriven #ChinaDriven
entry.content:
The ONVO L80 is the latest EV from NIO's sub brand. The ONVO L80 is a 5-seat variant of the previously popular ONVO L90. In this video, we take a quick yet thorough look at the L80 and explore how ONVO has reworked the L90 into a large 5 seat version.

This video covers all the major details of the ONVO L80, from its stylish green colour and frunk features to the massive trunk space that easily rivals the NIO ET5 Touring. We also take a look at the upgraded ADAS system, now with roof-mounted LIDAR, making the ONVO L80 an even smarter vehicle than the first ONVO L90.

Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇
____________________________________________________________
✅ Highlights:

Same dimensions as the L90 with a new green color
Spacious 240-liter frunk & innovative camp kitchen
Upgraded ADAS hardware, including roof-mounted LIDAR
Impressive 17.3-inch rear entertainment screen
23-speaker sound system with 7.1.4 Dolby Atmos
Efficient with 14.3kWh/100km for rear-wheel drive

____________________________________________________________

entry.title: NIO ES9: Germany Has NO ANSWER To This Chinese SUV!
entry.summary:
The NIO ES9 is the SUV version of NIO's flagship ET9 sedan, combining high-tech luxury with the space and versatility of a large SUV. With its commanding road presence, 6 seat configuration, and a tech-forward interior, it might just be the answer to the growing demand for luxury EV SUVs. But how does it perform? Does it live up to the luxury SUV competition, or is it just another overhyped tech showcase?
In this video, we explore the NIO ES9’s design, features. Do you really need to spend top dollar for a luxury Rolls, Bentley or Aston to get the best of the best? I don't think so.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 ______________________________________________________________
✅ Highlights:
- Stunning road presence - 600L trunk space - Brand new 47-speaker sound system with Dolby Atmos - Instant intelligent privacy glass - 42-point Spa Massage - 20-point foot massage! ______________________________________________________________
⏱️ Video Chapters:
00:00 - NIO ES9 Intro 00:35 - NIO Recap 03:12 - Exterior Features: Headlights, Frunk, and More 01:25 - Why will the NIO ES9 sell better? 01:59 - NIO ES9 vs Competition
02:49 - NIO ES9 Exterior Styling 03:11 - NIO ES9 Frunk Space 04:12 - NIO ES9 Exterior Styling Continued
05:15 - NIO ES9 Trunk Space
06:19 - NIO ES9 Interior (Front)
08:53 - NIO ES9 Interior (2nd row) 09:25 - NIO ES9 Audio System 12;05 - NIO ES9 2nd Row Seat Functions! 11:03 - Drinking on the Job! 13:36 - Wing Spread Executive Center Console 15:21 - Creepy NIO ES9 Function…
15:51 - NIO ES9 Interior (3rd row) 16:11 - NIO ES9 3rd row space 17:04 - NIO ES9 3rd row features 18:22 - NIO ES9 Sun spot detection 18:39 - NIO ES9 Intelligent Smoking Mode
19:04 - Outro ______________________________________________________________
📍 Shot in Beijing, China 🎥 Subscribe for more in-depth reviews of the latest Chinese EVs
𝕏 https://x.com/chinadriven 📸 https://instagram.com/chinadriven ▶️ https://youtube.com/chinadriven
#NIOES9 #ElectricSUV #ChinaEV #NIOReview #EVReview #LuxurySUV #蔚来ES9 #ChineseEV #ElectricVehicle #NIO

The NIO ES9 is the SUV version of NIO's flagship ET9 sedan, combining high-tech luxury with the space and versatility of a large SUV. With its commanding road presence, 6 seat configuration, and a tech-forward interior, it might just be the answer to the growing demand for luxury EV SUVs. But how does it perform? Does it live up to the luxury SUV competition, or is it just another overhyped tech showcase?

In this video, we explore the NIO ES9’s design, features. Do you really need to spend top dollar for a luxury Rolls, Bentley or Aston to get the best of the best? I don't think so.

entry.title: Zeekr 8X DESTROYS European Luxury with 1400HP!
entry.summary:
Interested in importing a Chinese EV or Hybrid? Contact me via Whatsapp +86 18570089464 We can connect you with our experienced Car Export partner.
The Zeekr 8X is the missing link we've been waiting for in Zeekr’s design journey. This EV brings together sleek styling, performance, and luxury in one package. With up to 1,400 horsepower, advanced hybrid tech, and a plush interior, the Zeekr 8X is set to redefine the premium SUV market. From its cutting-edge infotainment system to its innovative ADAS features, let's dive into everything that makes the Zeekr 8X a game-changer in the world of Chinese EVs.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇
_______________________________________ ✅ Highlights:
- Evolutionary design blending sporty and luxury elements - Powerful hybrid system with up to 1,400HP - Premium interior - 6C Fast-charging
_______________________________________ ⏱️ Video Chapters:
00:00 - Intro 01:00 - Zeekr 8X: The Missing Design Link
01:24 - Zeekr 8X Exterior Styling
02:05 - Zeekr 8X Battery & Range 02:37 - Zeekr Super Hybrid System Explained!03:43 - Zeekr 8X Charging & Fuel Consumption
04:50 - Zeekr 8X Styling continued! 05:32 - Zeekr 8X Trunk Space
06:02 - Tri-Motor Madness!
07:53 - Zeekr 8X Interior (Front)10:49 - Zeekr 8X Interior (Rear)14:10 - Zeekr 8X Driving Impressions15:54 - Zeekr 8X Price16:08 - Zeekr 8X ADAS17:37 - Outro

entry.content:
Interested in importing a Chinese EV or Hybrid? Contact me via Whatsapp +86 18570089464
We can connect you with our experienced Car Export partner.

The Zeekr 8X is the missing link we've been waiting for in Zeekr’s design journey. This EV brings together sleek styling, performance, and luxury in one package. With up to 1,400 horsepower, advanced hybrid tech, and a plush interior, the Zeekr 8X is set to redefine the premium SUV market. From its cutting-edge infotainment system to its innovative ADAS features, let's dive into everything that makes the Zeekr 8X a game-changer in the world of Chinese EVs.

Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇

_______________________________________
✅ Highlights:

- Evolutionary design blending sporty and luxury elements
- Powerful hybrid system with up to 1,400HP
- Premium interior
- 6C Fast-charging

_______________________________________

00:00 - Intro
01:00 - Zeekr 8X: The Missing Design Link

01:24 - Zeekr 8X Exterior Styling

02:05 - Zeekr 8X Battery & Range
02:37 - Zeekr Super Hybrid System Explained!03:43 - Zeekr 8X Charging & Fuel Consumption

04:50 - Zeekr 8X Styling continued!

06:02 - Tri-Motor Madness!

entry.title: Xiaomi SU7 COOKED U.S. EVs Says MKBHD… New SU7 Is INSANE!
entry.summary:
Interested in importing a Chinese EV or Hybrid? Contact me via Whatsapp +86 18570089464 We can connect you with our experienced Car Export partner.
The updated Xiaomi SU7, an EV that brings cutting-edge tech and sporty performance, all wrapped up in a sleek design. Xiaomi's approach to creating an engaging, connected driving experience is evident throughout the Su7, from its seamless integration with the Xiaomi ecosystem to its improved powertrain and safety features. While the exterior design may still spark debate, the driving dynamics and tech-focused interior make this EV one to watch. Let’s dive in and see what’s new with the Xiaomi Su7 and whether it lives up to the hype.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 _______________________________________ ✅ Highlights:
- Enhanced driving dynamics and performance
- The updated interior with premium touches
- Still the driving King of Chinese EVs
- Better range & charging speeds _______________________________________ ⏱️ Video Chapters: 00:00 - Intro

entry.title: Li Auto i6: Controversial Looks Can't Hide Its GENIUS!
entry.summary:
Interested in importing a Chinese EV or Hybrid? Contact me via Whatsapp +86 18570089464 We can connect you with our experienced Car Export partner.
I look at tthe Li Auto i6, an EV that’s packed with premium features like a massive interior, top-tier ADAS, and super-fast charging. The Li Auto i6 offers impressive performance with its dual-motor AWD system and an interior that feels truly high-end. But here’s the kicker: the Li Auto i6’s styling is definitely controversial. Will buyers be able to look past the i6's awkward exterior and focus on everything else it has to offer? Let’s dive in and find out if the Li Auto i6 is a game-changing EV despite its looks.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 _______________________________________
✅ Highlights:
- The benchmark of premium Chinese EV interiors - SUPER fast charging - Copious amount of interior space - Li Auto's VLA City ADAS for smooth, stress-free driving in urban environments _______________________________________
⏱️ Video Chapters: 00:00 - Intro 00:35 - Li Auto History? 02:30 - Exterior Design (Li Auto i6) 03:52 - Storage Space (Li Auto i6)
04:56 - Price (Li Auto i6) 05:11 - What is that Wrap? 05:25 - Charging, Battery & Range (Li Auto i6)
06:16 - Power & Acceleration (Li Auto i6) 06:35 - Suspension & Comfort (Li Auto i6) 07:05 - Driving Impressions (Li Auto i6)
08:44 - Front Interior (Li Auto i6) 11:03 - Rear Interior (Li Auto i6)
13:00 - Explaining Li Auto i6 pricing & options 14:04 - Li Auto's VLA ADAS 17:34 - Outro _______________________________________ 📍 Shot in Shanghai/Chengzhou 🎥 Subscribe for more honest takes on the latest Chinese EVs & hybrids 𝕏 Follow me on X
📸 Follow on Instagram
▶️ Subscribe on YouTube
